kirklees_unique_strengths: Only T Level provider in Kirklees (8 programmes)
Specialist centres: Engineering, Construction, Animal Care, Process Manufacturing
Largest FE provider in Kirklees borough
Strong employer partnerships (Lloyds Banking Group, Jet2)

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Greenhead (Outstanding, 99% pass rate) and Huddersfield New College dominate A-Level provision. Kirklees College cannot compete on pure A-Level results.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: Focus on vocational excellence, T Levels, and mixed programmes rather than competing head-to-head on A-Levels.

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Huddersfield New College is the ONLY college in Kirklees offering mixed A-Level and BTEC at advanced level.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: Consider whether mixed pathway offering could be expanded.

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Bradford College won National Apprenticeship Provider of the Year 2026. Calderdale College has Outstanding Ofsted rating for apprenticeships.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: Strengthen apprenticeship marketing and seek award nominations to build brand.

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Leeds City College and Bradford College both strong in digital/computing. Limited digital course visibility for Kirklees.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: Ensure digital/IT/cyber courses are prominently marketed.

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Barnsley College explicitly offers online courses. Most competitors don't highlight this.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: If Kirklees offers online/blended delivery, make this more visible.

competitive_gaps_and_threats.threat: Two nearby competitors (Greenhead, Barnsley) hold Outstanding. Kirklees is Good.
competitive_gaps_and_threats.recommendation: Focus on areas of excellence for next inspection. Highlight specific Outstanding sub-grades if applicable.

kirklees_differentiators: Animal Care / Land-based Studies (specialist Taylor Hill Centre)

huddersfield.note: Three institutions compete directly for 16-18 students in same town

dewsbury_batley.note: Springfield Sixth Form Centre gives Kirklees presence but school sixth forms compete

north_kirklees.note: Students on boundaries may travel to Bradford or Halifax

south_east_kirklees.note: Some leakage to Wakefield especially from Dewsbury
